content:
# Tasks Document: Theme Cascade Refactor

## Phase 1: Theme infrastructure

- [ ] 1. Add new properties to MCalThemeData
  - File: lib/src/styles/mcal_theme.dart
  - Add `eventTileLightContrastColor` (Color?) and `eventTileDarkContrastColor` (Color?) to MCalThemeData. Update constructor, `fromTheme` factory (light: `Colors.white`, dark: `colorScheme.onSurface.withValues(alpha: 0.87)`), `copyWith`, `lerp`, `==`, `hashCode`. Update dartdoc with "master defaults" terminology.
  - _Leverage: Existing MCalThemeData property patterns, fromTheme factory._
  - _Requirements: 10.1_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-cascade-refactor, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Flutter theme developer. Task: Add eventTileLightContrastColor and eventTileDarkContrastColor (Color?) to MCalThemeData. Update constructor, fromTheme (derive from colorScheme), copyWith, lerp, ==, hashCode. Add dartdoc referencing "master defaults." Restrictions: Do not change any existing property semantics. _Leverage: mcal_theme.dart existing property patterns. _Requirements: 10.1. Success: Compiles, analyzer clean, existing tests pass. Before implementing: set this task to in-progress [-] in tasks.md. After completing: run log-implementation with artifacts, then set task to complete [x]._

- [ ] 2. Add new properties to MCalDayThemeData
  - File: lib/src/styles/mcal_day_theme_data.dart
  - Add 14 new properties: dropTargetTileBackgroundColor, dropTargetTileInvalidBackgroundColor, dropTargetTileCornerRadius, dropTargetTileBorderColor, dropTargetTileBorderWidth, dropTargetOverlayValidColor, dropTargetOverlayInvalidColor, dropTargetOverlayBorderWidth, dropTargetOverlayBorderColor, disabledTimeSlotColor, resizeHandleColor, keyboardFocusBorderColor, focusedSlotBorderColor, focusedSlotBorderWidth. Update constructor, `defaults()` factory (derive all from colorScheme), `copyWith`, `lerp`, `==`, `hashCode`.
  - _Leverage: Existing MCalDayThemeData property patterns, MCalMonthThemeData dropTargetTile* for naming._
  - _Requirements: 3.1, 4.1, 9.1_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-cascade-refactor, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Flutter theme developer. Task: Add 14 new properties to MCalDayThemeData (5 dropTargetTile*, 4 dropTargetOverlay*, disabledTimeSlotColor, resizeHandleColor, keyboardFocusBorderColor, focusedSlotBorderColor, focusedSlotBorderWidth). Update constructor, defaults() factory deriving from colorScheme (see design doc Component 3 table for exact defaults), copyWith, lerp, ==, hashCode. Restrictions: Follow existing property patterns exactly. Do not modify existing properties. _Leverage: mcal_day_theme_data.dart, mcal_month_theme_data.dart dropTargetTile* for naming reference. _Requirements: 3.1, 4.1, 9.1. Success: Compiles, analyzer clean, existing tests pass. Before implementing: set task [-] in tasks.md. After completing: log-implementation then set [x]._

- [ ] 3. Add new properties to MCalMonthThemeData
  - File: lib/src/styles/mcal_month_theme_data.dart
  - Add 5 new properties: defaultRegionColor, resizeHandleColor, overlayScrimColor, errorIconColor, overflowIndicatorTextStyle. Update constructor, `defaults()` factory (derive from colorScheme/textTheme; also replace Colors.green → colorScheme.tertiary for dropTargetCellValidColor and Colors.red → colorScheme.error for dropTargetCellInvalidColor), `copyWith`, `lerp`, `==`, `hashCode`.
  - _Leverage: Existing MCalMonthThemeData property patterns, defaults() factory._
  - _Requirements: 9.2, 9.5_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-cascade-refactor, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Flutter theme developer. Task: Add 5 new properties to MCalMonthThemeData (defaultRegionColor, resizeHandleColor, overlayScrimColor, errorIconColor, overflowIndicatorTextStyle). Update constructor, defaults() factory (derive from colorScheme/textTheme per design doc Component 4 table). Also fix existing defaults: dropTargetCellValidColor from Colors.green → colorScheme.tertiary.withValues(alpha: 0.3), dropTargetCellInvalidColor from Colors.red → colorScheme.error.withValues(alpha: 0.3). Update copyWith, lerp, ==, hashCode. Restrictions: Do not change existing property semantics. _Leverage: mcal_month_theme_data.dart existing patterns. _Requirements: 9.2, 9.5. Success: Compiles, analyzer clean, no Colors.* in defaults(). Before implementing: set task [-] in tasks.md. After completing: log-implementation then set [x]._

- [ ] 4. Modify MCalTheme.of() and fix lerp helpers
  - File: lib/src/styles/mcal_theme.dart
  - Remove `_fillNullSubThemes` static method. Change `of(context)` step 1 and 2 to return data as-is (no _fillNullSubThemes call). Change step 3 fallback from `MCalThemeData.fromTheme(themeData)` to `const MCalThemeData()`. Fix `_lerpMonthTheme`: both null → null, one null → return non-null side, remove `MCalMonthThemeData.defaults(ThemeData.light())`. Fix `_lerpDayTheme` the same way. Update dartdoc on `of()` to describe the new fallback chain and reference "master defaults."
  - _Leverage: Existing MCalTheme.of() implementation, design doc Component 1._
  - _Requirements: 2.2, 2.7, 2.8, 6.1, 6.3_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-cascade-refactor, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Flutter InheritedWidget developer. Task: (1) Delete _fillNullSubThemes. (2) In of(context): remove _fillNullSubThemes calls; change step 3 to return const MCalThemeData(). (3) Fix _lerpMonthTheme: both null → null; one null → non-null; remove ThemeData.light(). (4) Fix _lerpDayTheme same way. (5) Update of() dartdoc. Restrictions: Do not change maybeOf() or updateShouldNotify(). Note: this will cause existing tests that rely on _fillNullSubThemes or fromTheme() fallback to fail — they will be fixed in task 15. _Leverage: mcal_theme.dart, design doc Component 1. _Requirements: 2.2, 2.7, 2.8, 6.1, 6.3. Success: of() returns consumer theme as-is; lerp handles nulls correctly. Before implementing: set task [-] in tasks.md. After completing: log-implementation then set [x]._

## Phase 2: Cascade utility

- [ ] 5. Create shared cascade utility
  - File: lib/src/utils/theme_cascade_utils.dart (new file)
  - Implement `resolveEventTileColor()`, `resolveDropTargetTileColor()`, and `resolveContrastColor()` per the design doc Component 5. The cascade respects `ignoreEventColors`: false → event first; true → theme first. Both modes always include event.color as a fallback.
  - _Leverage: Design doc Component 5 code listing._
  - _Requirements: 7.1, 7.3, 7.4, 10.2_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-cascade-refactor, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Dart utility developer. Task: Create lib/src/utils/theme_cascade_utils.dart with three functions: resolveEventTileColor (ignoreEventColors false: eventColor → allDayThemeColor → themeColor → defaultColor; true: allDayThemeColor → themeColor → eventColor → defaultColor), resolveDropTargetTileColor (dropTargetThemeColor first, then delegates to resolveEventTileColor), resolveContrastColor (luminance-based, uses lightContrastColor/darkContrastColor). Follow exact signatures and dartdoc from design doc Component 5. Restrictions: No Colors.* imports; no Theme.of(context) — this is a pure utility. _Leverage: Design doc Component 5. _Requirements: 7.1, 7.3, 7.4, 10.2. Success: Compiles, pure functions, no side effects. Before implementing: set task [-] in tasks.md. After completing: log-implementation then set [x]._

- [ ] 6. Add cascade utility tests
  - File: test/utils/theme_cascade_utils_test.dart (new file)
  - Unit tests for all three functions. Test resolveEventTileColor with all combinations: ignoreEventColors true/false × themeColor null/non-null × eventColor null/non-null × allDayThemeColor null/non-null. Test resolveDropTargetTileColor: dropTargetThemeColor takes precedence. Test resolveContrastColor: dark background → light contrast, light background → dark contrast.
  - _Leverage: Existing test patterns in test/._
  - _Requirements: 7.1, NFR Reliability_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-cascade-refactor, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Test developer. Task: Create test/utils/theme_cascade_utils_test.dart. Test resolveEventTileColor: (1) ignoreEventColors false, both non-null → eventColor wins; (2) true, both non-null → themeColor wins; (3) true, theme null → eventColor fallback; (4) false, event null → themeColor fallback; (5) all null → defaultColor; (6) allDayThemeColor precedence. Test resolveDropTargetTileColor: dropTargetThemeColor precedence. Test resolveContrastColor: luminance threshold. Restrictions: Use flutter_test. _Leverage: test/ patterns. _Requirements: 7.1, NFR Reliability. Success: All tests pass. Before implementing: set task [-] in tasks.md. After completing: log-implementation then set [x]._

## Phase 3: Day View widget updates

- [ ] 7. Update Day View drop target tile (mcal_day_view.dart)
  - File: lib/src/widgets/mcal_day_view.dart
  - In `_buildDropTargetPreviewLayer`: obtain master defaults via `MCalThemeData.fromTheme(Theme.of(context))`. Replace inline cascade with `resolveDropTargetTileColor()` using `theme.dayTheme?.dropTargetTileBackgroundColor`. Replace hardcoded `Colors.red` invalid color with `theme.dayTheme?.dropTargetTileInvalidBackgroundColor ?? defaults.dayTheme!.dropTargetTileInvalidBackgroundColor`. Use `theme.dayTheme?.dropTargetTileBorderColor/Width/CornerRadius ?? defaults.dayTheme!.*` for border and corner radius. Remove all `Colors.blue` / `Colors.red` from this method.
  - _Leverage: theme_cascade_utils.dart resolveDropTargetTileColor, design doc Component 7._
  - _Requirements: 2.4, 3.2, 8.2, 8.4_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-cascade-refactor, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Flutter widget developer. Task: In mcal_day_view.dart _buildDropTargetPreviewLayer, obtain defaults via MCalThemeData.fromTheme(Theme.of(context)). Replace inline color cascade with resolveDropTargetTileColor(dropTargetThemeColor: theme.dayTheme?.dropTargetTileBackgroundColor, themeColor: theme.eventTileBackgroundColor, eventColor: event.color, ignoreEventColors: theme.ignoreEventColors, defaultColor: defaults.eventTileBackgroundColor!). Replace all hardcoded Colors.blue/red with theme/defaults properties (dropTargetTileInvalidBackgroundColor, dropTargetTileBorderColor, dropTargetTileBorderWidth, dropTargetTileCornerRadius). Import theme_cascade_utils.dart. Restrictions: No Colors.* in this method. _Leverage: theme_cascade_utils.dart, mcal_day_theme_data.dart. _Requirements: 2.4, 3.2, 8.2, 8.4. Success: No Colors.* in method; cascade uses utility. Before implementing: set task [-] in tasks.md. After completing: log-implementation then set [x]._

- [ ] 8. Update Day View drop target overlay (mcal_day_view.dart)
  - File: lib/src/widgets/mcal_day_view.dart
  - In `_buildDropTargetOverlayLayer`: obtain master defaults. Replace `Colors.blue.withValues(alpha: 0.2)` / `Colors.red.withValues(alpha: 0.2)` with `theme.dayTheme?.dropTargetOverlayValidColor ?? defaults.dayTheme!.dropTargetOverlayValidColor` (and invalid). Replace hardcoded border width `3` with `theme.dayTheme?.dropTargetOverlayBorderWidth ?? defaults.dayTheme!.dropTargetOverlayBorderWidth`. Replace border color with `theme.dayTheme?.dropTargetOverlayBorderColor ?? defaults.dayTheme!.dropTargetOverlayBorderColor`.
  - _Leverage: Design doc Component 3 table for defaults._
  - _Requirements: 4.1, 4.2_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-cascade-refactor, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Flutter widget developer. Task: In mcal_day_view.dart _buildDropTargetOverlayLayer, obtain defaults. Replace Colors.blue/red overlay colors with theme.dayTheme?.dropTargetOverlayValidColor/InvalidColor ?? defaults. Replace hardcoded border width 3 and color with theme.dayTheme?.dropTargetOverlayBorderWidth/Color ?? defaults. Restrictions: No Colors.* in this method; no direct Theme.of(context).colorScheme. _Requirements: 4.1, 4.2. Success: Overlay fully themed. Before implementing: set task [-] in tasks.md. After completing: log-implementation then set [x]._

- [ ] 9. Update Day View focused slot and keyboard focus (mcal_day_view.dart)
  - File: lib/src/widgets/mcal_day_view.dart
  - In `_buildFocusedSlotIndicator` and empty schedule focus: replace `Theme.of(context).colorScheme.primary` with `theme.dayTheme?.focusedSlotBorderColor ?? defaults.dayTheme!.focusedSlotBorderColor` and `theme.dayTheme?.focusedSlotBorderWidth ?? defaults.dayTheme!.focusedSlotBorderWidth`. The `focusedSlotBackgroundColor` fallback also goes through defaults.
  - _Leverage: Design doc, Req 9.1._
  - _Requirements: 9.1, 9.4, NFR No Direct colorScheme_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-cascade-refactor, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Flutter widget developer. Task: In mcal_day_view.dart, update _buildFocusedSlotIndicator and the empty schedule focus indicator. Replace all Theme.of(context).colorScheme.primary with theme.dayTheme?.focusedSlotBorderColor ?? defaults.dayTheme!.focusedSlotBorderColor. Replace hardcoded width 3 with theme.dayTheme?.focusedSlotBorderWidth ?? defaults.dayTheme!.focusedSlotBorderWidth. Replace focusedSlotBackgroundColor fallback colorScheme.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.08) with defaults.dayTheme!.focusedSlotBackgroundColor. Restrictions: No Theme.of(context).colorScheme in widget code. _Requirements: 9.1, 9.4, NFR. Success: No direct colorScheme access. Before implementing: set task [-] in tasks.md. After completing: log-implementation then set [x]._

- [ ] 10. Update Day View sub-widgets (6 files)
  - Files: time_grid_events_layer.dart, all_day_events_section.dart, gridlines_layer.dart, time_regions_layer.dart, time_legend_column.dart, current_time_indicator.dart
  - In each file: obtain master defaults. Replace all Colors.* fallbacks and direct colorScheme access with `theme.* ?? defaults.*` pattern. In time_grid_events_layer: replace `_getContrastColor` with `resolveContrastColor()` from cascade utility, using `theme.eventTileLightContrastColor ?? defaults.eventTileLightContrastColor!` and dark variant. Replace tile color cascade with `resolveEventTileColor()`. In all_day_events_section: same for tile cascade and keyboard focus border (use keyboardFocusBorderColor). In time_legend_column: replace colorScheme.outline fallback with defaults. In all files: replace keyboard focus `colorScheme.primary` with `theme.dayTheme?.keyboardFocusBorderColor ?? defaults.dayTheme!.keyboardFocusBorderColor`.
  - _Leverage: theme_cascade_utils.dart, design doc Component 7 tables._
  - _Requirements: 2.3, 7.2, 8.1, 8.4, 9.1, 10.2, NFR_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-cascade-refactor, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Flutter widget developer. Task: Update 6 Day View sub-widget files. In each: (1) obtain defaults = MCalThemeData.fromTheme(Theme.of(context)). (2) Replace every Colors.* fallback with theme.property ?? defaults.property (or defaults.dayTheme!.property for day-specific). (3) In time_grid_events_layer: replace _getContrastColor with resolveContrastColor from theme_cascade_utils; replace tile color cascade with resolveEventTileColor; replace keyboard focus colorScheme.primary with theme.dayTheme?.keyboardFocusBorderColor ?? defaults. (4) In all_day_events_section: same cascade + keyboard focus + contrast changes. (5) In time_legend_column: replace colorScheme.outline fallback with defaults.dayTheme!.timeLegendTickColor. (6) In gridlines_layer, time_regions_layer, current_time_indicator: replace Colors.grey/red/black54 with defaults. Restrictions: No Colors.* or colorScheme in widget code. Import theme_cascade_utils.dart. _Requirements: 2.3, 7.2, 8.1, 8.4, 9.1, 10.2, NFR. Success: Zero Colors.* in these 6 files. Before implementing: set task [-] in tasks.md. After completing: log-implementation then set [x]._

- [ ] 11. Update Day View remaining sub-widgets (3 files)
  - Files: day_header.dart, disabled_time_slots_layer.dart, shared/time_resize_handle.dart
  - In day_header: obtain defaults; replace Colors.grey, Colors.black54, Colors.grey[600], Colors.black87 with defaults. In disabled_time_slots_layer: add `Color? disabledTimeSlotColor` parameter; parent passes resolved color. In time_resize_handle: add `Color? resizeHandleColor` parameter; parent passes resolved color. Update all parent call sites to pass resolved colors from theme/defaults.
  - _Leverage: Design doc Component 7 widgets needing parameter additions._
  - _Requirements: 9.1, 9.5, 9.6_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-cascade-refactor, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Flutter widget developer. Task: (1) day_header.dart: obtain defaults, replace all Colors.grey/black54/grey[600]/black87 with theme ?? defaults. (2) disabled_time_slots_layer.dart: add Color? disabledTimeSlotColor parameter; use it instead of Colors.grey.withValues(alpha: 0.3); update parent call site to pass theme.dayTheme?.disabledTimeSlotColor ?? defaults.dayTheme!.disabledTimeSlotColor. (3) time_resize_handle.dart: add Color? resizeHandleColor parameter; use it; update parent to pass resolved color. Restrictions: Keep widgets simple — pass resolved colors, not full theme. _Requirements: 9.1, 9.5, 9.6. Success: No Colors.* in these files; parents pass resolved colors. Before implementing: set task [-] in tasks.md. After completing: log-implementation then set [x]._

## Phase 4: Month View widget updates

- [ ] 12. Update Month View drop target tile (month_page_widget.dart)
  - File: lib/src/widgets/month_subwidgets/month_page_widget.dart
  - In `_buildDefaultDropTargetTile`: obtain master defaults. Replace inline cascade with `resolveDropTargetTileColor()`. Replace all Colors.blue/red/white/green fallbacks with theme/defaults properties. For `DropTargetHighlightPainter` call: replace Colors.green/red fallbacks with `theme.monthTheme?.dropTargetCellValidColor ?? defaults.monthTheme!.dropTargetCellValidColor` (and invalid). For the resize handle in drop target: pass resolved `resizeHandleColor`.
  - _Leverage: theme_cascade_utils.dart, design doc Component 7._
  - _Requirements: 2.4, 8.2, 8.4, NFR DropTargetHighlightPainter_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-cascade-refactor, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Flutter widget developer. Task: In month_page_widget.dart _buildDefaultDropTargetTile: (1) obtain defaults. (2) Replace tile color cascade with resolveDropTargetTileColor. (3) Replace all Colors.blue/red with theme/defaults for invalid color, border color, fill. (4) For DropTargetHighlightPainter: pass theme.monthTheme?.dropTargetCellValidColor ?? defaults.monthTheme!.dropTargetCellValidColor (and invalid). (5) For resize handle: pass resolved resizeHandleColor. Restrictions: No Colors.* in this method. _Requirements: 2.4, 8.2, 8.4. Success: No Colors.* in drop target code. Before implementing: set task [-] in tasks.md. After completing: log-implementation then set [x]._

- [ ] 13. Update DropTargetHighlightPainter
  - File: lib/src/widgets/month_subwidgets/drop_target_highlight_painter.dart
  - Make `validColor` and `invalidColor` required parameters (remove default hex literal values `Color(0x4000FF00)` and `Color(0x40FF0000)`). Verify all call sites already pass explicit colors (from task 12).
  - _Leverage: NFR DropTargetHighlightPainter._
  - _Requirements: NFR DropTargetHighlightPainter_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-cascade-refactor, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Dart API developer. Task: In drop_target_highlight_painter.dart, make validColor and invalidColor required constructor parameters. Remove their default values (Color(0x4000FF00) and Color(0x40FF0000)). Verify all call sites pass explicit colors. Restrictions: All callers must compile. _Requirements: NFR DropTargetHighlightPainter. Success: No default color literals; compiles. Before implementing: set task [-] in tasks.md. After completing: log-implementation then set [x]._

- [ ] 14. Update Month View sub-widgets (7 files)
  - Files: week_row_widget.dart, day_cell_widget.dart, weekday_header_row_widget.dart, week_number_cell.dart, month_navigator_widget.dart, month_overlays.dart, mcal_month_multi_day_tile.dart
  - In each: obtain master defaults. Replace all Colors.* and colorScheme with theme/defaults. In week_row_widget: (1) replace tile color cascade with resolveEventTileColor; (2) keyboard selection border uses resolveContrastColor with contrast theme properties; (3) event tile text style falls through to defaults; (4) date label styling uses defaults; (5) overflow indicator uses theme.monthTheme?.overflowIndicatorTextStyle ?? defaults.monthTheme!.overflowIndicatorTextStyle. In day_cell_widget: replace Colors.grey region fallback with theme.monthTheme?.defaultRegionColor ?? defaults.monthTheme!.defaultRegionColor. In month_overlays: replace scrim Colors.black with overlayScrimColor, replace colorScheme.error with errorIconColor. In mcal_month_multi_day_tile: use resolveEventTileColor with allDayThemeColor, respecting ignoreEventColors (Req 5). In month_resize_handle: add Color? resizeHandleColor parameter; parent passes resolved color.
  - _Leverage: theme_cascade_utils.dart, design doc Component 7 tables._
  - _Requirements: 2.3, 5.1, 5.2, 7.2, 8.1, 8.4, 9.2, 9.3, 10.2_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-cascade-refactor, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Flutter widget developer. Task: Update 7 Month View files. In each: obtain defaults = MCalThemeData.fromTheme(Theme.of(context)). (1) week_row_widget: replace tile cascade with resolveEventTileColor; keyboard border with resolveContrastColor(theme.eventTileLightContrastColor ?? defaults, dark variant); text style/date label/overflow indicator fallbacks via defaults. (2) day_cell_widget: region color via theme.monthTheme?.defaultRegionColor ?? defaults; cell border via defaults. (3) weekday_header_row_widget, week_number_cell: border/text via defaults. (4) month_overlays: scrim via theme.monthTheme?.overlayScrimColor ?? defaults; error icon via theme.monthTheme?.errorIconColor ?? defaults. (5) mcal_month_multi_day_tile: use resolveEventTileColor with allDayThemeColor, respecting ignoreEventColors. (6) month_resize_handle: add Color? resizeHandleColor param. Restrictions: No Colors.* or colorScheme in widget code. _Requirements: 2.3, 5.1, 5.2, 7.2, 8.1, 8.4, 9.2, 9.3, 10.2. Success: Zero Colors.* in these files. Before implementing: set task [-] in tasks.md. After completing: log-implementation then set [x]._

## Phase 5: Tests and documentation

- [ ] 15. Fix existing tests broken by MCalTheme.of() changes
  - Files: test/ (various existing test files)
  - After task 4, `MCalTheme.of()` no longer fills null sub-themes or falls back to `fromTheme()`. Existing tests that relied on `theme.monthTheme` or `theme.dayTheme` being auto-populated will now get nulls. Fix by wrapping test widgets in `MCalTheme(data: MCalThemeData.fromTheme(theme))` where a fully populated theme is expected, or by updating assertions to match the new null-returning behavior.
  - _Leverage: Existing test infrastructure._
  - _Requirements: 2.2, 6.1, NFR Reliability_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-cascade-refactor, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Test developer. Task: Run flutter test and identify all failures caused by (1) MCalTheme.of() returning MCalThemeData() instead of fromTheme() (2) null monthTheme/dayTheme sub-themes (3) Colors.* removal in widget code. Fix each by: wrapping in MCalTheme(data: MCalThemeData.fromTheme(theme)) if the test needs a full theme, or updating assertions for new defaults. Do NOT re-introduce _fillNullSubThemes or Colors.* fallbacks. Restrictions: All existing tests must pass. _Requirements: 2.2, 6.1, NFR Reliability. Success: flutter test passes 100%. Before implementing: set task [-] in tasks.md. After completing: log-implementation then set [x]._

- [ ] 16. Add new theme cascade tests
  - Files: test/styles/mcal_theme_test.dart, test/styles/mcal_day_theme_data_test.dart, test/styles/mcal_month_theme_data_test.dart (new or existing)
  - Test MCalTheme.of() returns consumer theme as-is (nulls preserved, no _fillNullSubThemes). Test lerp: both null → null, one null → non-null. Test new properties in copyWith, lerp, ==, hashCode for all three theme classes. Test defaults() factories populate all new properties with non-null values.
  - _Leverage: Existing theme test patterns._
  - _Requirements: 1.1, 2.2, 2.7, 2.8, 3.1, 4.1, 9.1, 9.2, 10.1_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-cascade-refactor, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Test developer. Task: Add theme cascade tests. (1) MCalTheme.of: returns consumer theme as-is with nulls; returns MCalThemeData() when no ancestor. (2) Lerp: both null → null; one null → non-null; no ThemeData.light(). (3) MCalThemeData: new contrast color properties in copyWith/lerp/==/hashCode; fromTheme populates them. (4) MCalDayThemeData: 14 new properties in copyWith/lerp/==/hashCode; defaults() populates all. (5) MCalMonthThemeData: 5 new properties; defaults() replaces Colors.green/red with colorScheme. Restrictions: Use flutter_test. _Requirements: 1.1, 2.2, 2.7, 2.8, 3.1, 4.1, 9.1, 9.2, 10.1. Success: All new tests pass. Before implementing: set task [-] in tasks.md. After completing: log-implementation then set [x]._

- [ ] 17. Add widget-level cascade integration tests
  - Files: test/widgets/ (new test files or additions to existing)
  - Test that each tile type uses the correct cascade order. Test ignoreEventColors: false → event color wins; true → theme wins. Test multi-day tile respects ignoreEventColors. Test drop target tiles use dropTargetTile* properties. Test Day View overlay uses overlay theme properties. Test keyboard focus borders use theme properties. Test no Colors.* appear in rendered widget trees.
  - _Leverage: Existing widget test patterns, flutter_test._
  - _Requirements: 2.3, 2.5, 5.1, 5.2, 8.1, 8.3_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec theme-cascade-refactor, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Test developer. Task: Add widget-level cascade tests. (1) Timed event tile: ignoreEventColors false with event.color → renders event color; true → renders theme color. (2) All-day tile: allDayEventBackgroundColor cascades correctly. (3) Multi-day tile: ignoreEventColors respected. (4) Drop target tile (Day + Month): dropTargetTileBackgroundColor takes precedence. (5) Day View overlay: dropTargetOverlayValidColor used. (6) Keyboard focus border: keyboardFocusBorderColor used. (7) Contrast color: eventTileLightContrastColor/DarkContrastColor used for text. Restrictions: Use flutter_test pumpWidget with MCalTheme wrapping. _Requirements: 2.3, 2.5, 5.1, 5.2, 8.1, 8.3. Success: All tests pass, cover both ignoreEventColors modes. Before implementing: set task [-] in tasks.md. After completing: log-implementation then set [x]._

- [ ] 18. Update dartdoc and exports
